posts.author: Kathrynbell (Kathryn Bell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In order to use the new resource planners and portfolio capacity manager fully for resourcing, we need to also be able to choose people with viewer accounts/freelancers.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to add these people to the resource directory with additional attributes (role and skills) would be very beneficial so that we can allocate work/hours to people who do not have full user licenses.

posts.author: DavidDvorak (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agree, I think it’s a severe limitation to not be able to use viewers in resource planning. It’s completely reasonable to have Viewers that do not edit/update in Monday but need to be accounted for in resource plans. If I pay for the Enterprise Edition I should be able to use all features freely which includes Resource Management. Viewers are part of my account, I should be able to manage them as resources for my work regardless of whether they can edit in the tool

The workaround is to create placeholders. Fine, but then I lose the core placeholder functionality. I can create a placeholder named “Joe Viewer”, but then I lose the ability to align Joe Viewer to a role, create a placeholder for that role, and replace the placeholder with Joe Viewer.
